robots.name: A/B Test Calculator
robots.description: Statistical significance, confidence intervals, sample size calculator.

robots.description: Step wizard: goal, audience, channels, timeline. Pre-built templates. Export markdown.

robots.name: Content Calendar
robots.description: Visual monthly calendar with drag-and-drop. Color-coded by platform. Export JSON/CSV.

robots.name: Launch Checklist
robots.description: Pre-launch, launch day, post-launch. 5 templates. Track progress, export markdown.

robots.name: Pricing Page Generator
robots.description: Build 2-4 tier pricing. Cards/table/slider layouts. Export as HTML.

robots.name: SWOT Analysis
robots.description: Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats. Auto-generate strategic actions.

robots.name: UTM Link Builder
robots.description: Build tracked URLs. Platform presets, QR code, history. Copy to clipboard.

robots.name: Social Bio Generator
robots.description: Platform-specific bios (X, IG, LinkedIn, TikTok). 4 tones, emoji, char counter.

robots.name: Hashtag Research
robots.description: Topic to hashtags. Broad, niche, branded categories. Optimal mix for each platform.

robots.name: Social Post Generator
robots.description: Platform-specific posts with tone control. Hashtag suggestions, char limits, copy to clipboard.

robots.name: Customer Journey Mapper
robots.description: Map 5 stages with touchpoints, emotions, pain points. Export PNG.

robots.name: Email Subject Lines
robots.description: Generate 10 subject lines in 5 styles. Open-rate scoring, A/B compare, copy.

robots.name: Headline A/B Tester
robots.description: Score 2 headlines on emotion, power, clarity, curiosity. Predict CTR winner.

robots.name: Customer Persona Builder
robots.description: Visual persona cards. Demographics, goals, frustrations. Trading-card output.

robots.name: Value Proposition Canvas
robots.description: Customer jobs/pains/gains vs your products/relievers/creators. Fit scoring.

robots.name: Competitor Quick Audit
robots.description: Score vs 3 competitors. SEO, content, social, UX. Radar chart + action items.

robots.name: Keyword Planner
robots.description: Seed keyword to long-tail, questions, comparisons. Intent categorization. CSV export.

robots.name: SEO Meta Generator
robots.description: Generate title, description, OG tags. Preview in Google search and social cards.

robots.name: Domain Name Generator
robots.description: Generate brandable names + check availability. Chrome AI support. Algorithmic + heuristic domain checking.

robots.name: AI Content Writer
robots.description: Blog posts, product copy, social packs, emails. Uses YOUR OpenAI key. Without key: template-based generation.

robots.name: Social Schedule Planner
robots.description: Visual weekly planner with best-time-to-post highlights. Drag posts, optimize timing, export schedule.
